name: Sandtortchen (Sand Tarts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and butter together until smooth.
2. Beat in the eggs one at a time.
3. Gradually blend in the flour using a fork or whisk.
4. Chill the dough overnight to firm it up.
5. Roll out the dough as thin as possible on a well-floured surface.
6. Work with about 1/4 of the dough at a time, keeping the rest chilled.
7. Cut into diamond shapes using a sharp knife.
8. Place the cookies on greased cookie sheets.
9. Brush each cookie with beaten egg white.
10. Sprinkle with sugar and a pinch of cinnamon.
11. Place a pecan half in the center of each cookie.
12. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 8 to 10 minutes, or until the edges are lightly browned.
13. Allow the cookies to cool on the sheets for 1 minute before transferring them to wire racks.
14. Store in airtight tins.
